titleStmt.title: SII 15.691: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 691. (B.K. No. 37 of 1930-31.) YĀḶVĀR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the compound wall of the Sōmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1479 Piṅgaḷa, Vaiśākha ba. 5, Sunday, Mūlā-nakshatra, corresponding to 1557 A.D., April 18.

It records the construction of a step-well called Sōma-tīrtha in the south-eastern corner of the Sōmēśvara temple by Chenna-Basavantarāya. This Chenna-Basavantarāya is described as the grandson of Nāganāyaka of Pākanāṭi-kula, chief of Yāḷavara in the region of Vijayapura. The construction was undertaken with the approval of Rāmaṇa-nāyaka who was the junior uncle of the donor and administrative head of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī sōmēsvaraliṁgāya namaḥ guruvē gati
Avighnamastu svastiśrīmatu . śālivāha
na śaka 1439 neya piṁgaḷanāma saṁvatsarada
vayiśākha vadi paṁcami bhānuvāra mūla nakṣa
tra sidanāmayōgadalu śrīmatu . harana girijā
varana karuṇākarana duritāṁtarana gaṁgādharana
phaṇiya kuṁḍalana haranu sikharananilagaṇa
nigamasvarūpade nīlakaṁṭhābharaṇa bhasmādidhūḷi
tāṁgana citrakāyana ciṁnmayoṁbarana sūlavi
ra pālisirabhūhidasabhujada gauriya bālanaṁ
ghriya Arcipuvījeya hurasimiyoḷu yāḷavarada
Arasu pākanāṭiya kulābdhicaṁdrama nāganāykana su
putra kuladīpaka basavaṁtarāyara paramaṁmmanava
ra sukumāra ceṁnnabasavaṁttarāyaru taṁ
mma kulasvāmi sōmēsvaradēvara karuṇaka
ṭākṣadi svagrāmada Adhikāri taṁma kiriya
ppa rāmaṇa nāykarige nirūpisi dēvara sivā
lōtta Ayidumārina Āḷatiyali Ājñēya
deseyalu Uttara sōpānavāgi nirmisida kū
pa sōmatīrtthaveṁdu meradadu ttrailōkya
varivaṁdadali svagrāmada prabhu taṁmma svagōtrada
kirināykara putra nāgaṇa gauḍa svahasta svagrāmada kara
ṇika viśvāmitragōtra kauṁsika pravarada paremarsapaṁḍi
tara suta narasiṁhma paṁḍitara Aṇuga nāgarsa
kūpa saṁpūrṇa
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.691 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
